opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has blown up like a balloon, the cramps are unbearable, and I haven't been able to pass wind all evening. I'm scared it's a blockage.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started after dinner and it's getting worse — I didn't know whether to go to hospital.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 6 hours ago, after a big pasta meal
symptom_narrative.character: colicky, crampy, comes in waves, with severe bloating
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: waves of cramp with constant distension
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much, moving around a little
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no vomiting, no fever, no lower right pain; passing some wind is difficult; bowels last opened this morning
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get bloating and gut symptoms on and off, usually milder

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: ongoing gut symptoms, awaiting gluten-sensitivity results

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: recently told her gluten-sensitivity blood test may be positive

objective_data_offered.value: my abdomen looks visibly swollen/distended on camera
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual only; cannot assess guarding, rebound, bowel sounds or percussion note remotely
